titleStmt.title: SII 20.138: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 138. (B.K. No. 14 of 1937-38.) BHŪYĀR, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab near the ruined Mallikārjuna temple on the bank of the Bhīmarathī river.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 7, Chitrabhānu, Vaiśākha, Amāvāsya, Monday. The details of the date correspond to A.D. 1162, May 16, which was a Wednesday and not Monday.

The inscription states that Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka Lakshmīdēva who was governing Mūvattāruṁ-bāḍa, visited Buyyāra for the purpose of taking bath in the river there and made a grant of land, jointly with the four karaṇas and others, headed by his perggaḍe Nāgyaṇa-nāyaka, to Basavayya, the servant of Śivayōgi Sātayya of Neluvige for the benefit of the latter.

A further gift to the temple of Abhinaya-Mallikārjuna at Buyyāra, in the year Sarvadhāri during the reign of Rāyamurāri Sōvidēva, by Kopparasa, an officer of Maiḷeya-Nāyaka, Chikka-Chaṇḍarasa and others, is recorded at the end of the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© neluvigeya sātaiyagaḷa divyaśrīpādagaḷē śaraṇu
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) . svasti śrī matkaḷacuri
ya kuḷabhujabaḷacakravartti tribhuvanama
lladēvaru kalyāṇada nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷa
ppa śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ lakṣmīdēvadaṇḍanāyakaṁ mū
vattāṟuṁbāḍavaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyiṁdāḷu
ttamirddu buyyārakke nadīsnānanimittaṁ baṁdu kū
ḍala Abhinavamallikārjjunadēvaraṁ ka(ṁ)ṇḍu taṁna pergga
ḍe nāgyaṇanāyaka pramukha nāluku karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ pe
rggaḍe nāgadēvanuṁ cikka caṁḍarasaṁ sāṁbarasaṁ mācagāu
ṁḍa rēcigāuḍaruṁ mukhyavāgi samasta mānyakāṟaruṁ
Ēḷaneya citrabhānu saṁvatsarada vaiśākhada Amavā
sye sōmavāra byatīpātadaṁdu neluvigeya śivayōgi sā
taiyyananuddēśisi Avara bhritya basavayyaṁge Ūriṁ paḍuva .
bēvinūra dāriyiṁ baḍaga Ammabbēśvarada staḷadiṁ mūḍa sūryya
dēvara keIṁ teṁka sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaru māṇikēśvarada kōlalu

mā[ṟida Aḍa]
lli māna Oṁdu koṁḍavaralli māna Oṁdu nānūrvvaru mu(ṁ)mmuridaṇḍaṁ
gaḷuṁ poṁge hattaḍake hēṟiṁge Aivattele poṁge Aivala Ārisina . me
ḷasu poṁge solage . jīrage Ajavāna . tūkada ba(ṁ)ṇḍake poṁge
bēḷe . muṁmurida(ṁ)ṇḍaṁ seṭṭiguttaruṁ buyyāra staḷadalli Irdokka
lalli Ettu kōṇa kattegaḷa sārige bīravaṇavaṁ dēvara caitrapavi
trakke biṭṭaru . śrīmanmahāmaṁṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tardavāḍiya
ma(ṁ)nneya Aruvaṇa mānyadali Āyadāyavaṁ caṁdrādityaruḷḷaṁnaṁ
dēvarige biṭṭu pratipāḷisuvaru . śrīmatu maiḷeyanāyaka
na Adhikāri kopparasanuṁ cikka cennarasanuṁ lakkarasana sōvarasa
nuṁ sāṁbarasanuṁ dēvarige dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi rāyamurāri sōvidēvavarṣa
da sarvvadhāri saṁvatsarada biṭṭa mattaru 60 maṁ Aṟu geyaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 20.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
